content: Domain boundaries: root governance docs, ceo-owned by precedent, no Law 4 violation. Pass.
EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001: both files re-read post-write and match intended content exactly. Pass.

Correction from staged draft: proposal-2's original CLAUDE.md draft pointed its Startup Protocol at .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (the Codex twin) inside a Claude Code file -- the exact mistake proposal-3's own reasoning warned against. Caught and fixed during make: CLAUDE.md now points at .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (Claude-native), AGENTS.md points at .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (Codex-native). Each tool checks its own twin.

Proposal-1 (.clinerules) confirmed untouched -- no new file, no reference added anywhere. This cycle's approval scope was explicitly limited to proposals 2 and 3; a bare '/ceo:approve-initiative' with no resolution of the flagged item does not constitute consent to build it.
